MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Personal Representative and the Attorney for failure to file the Inventory and Appraisal. The return date is February 23, 2009 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Shannon.
